use_cases: Product image galleries for e-commerce product pages
Photo album or portfolio showcases with thumbnail navigation
Blog post content carousels with visual thumbnails
Team member or testimonial sliders with preview thumbnails
Before/after comparison galleries with thumbnail navigation
ai_summary: A thumbnail-based image carousel component featuring a large main image display area with clickable thumbnail indicators and prev/next navigation arrows. Built with Ark UI Carousel, supports dark mode via Tailwind dark: classes, includes hover state transitions on navigation controls and thumbnails, and uses overflow scrolling for mobile-friendly thumbnail navigation.
